notes: This JSON is a declarative operation plan for recreating the current 3-slide deck via Office Win32 COM.
An executor should map op=addTextBox/addShape/addConnector/addFreeformConnector/setBackground to PowerPoint COM calls.
Colors are hex RGB. Coordinates are PowerPoint points.

operations.name: s1.c1.lead
operations.text: Enable Societas to operate WorkIQ on the user’s behalf — without screenshots, copy/paste, or manual CLI handoff.

operations.name: s1.c1.bullets
operations.text:
• Cloud Agent handles reasoning
• WorkIQ was accessible only through workiq CLI
• Users expect execution, not manual relay

operations.name: s1.c1.quote
operations.text: Not remote control. A governed execution bridge into the user’s real work environment.

operations.name: s1.c2.lead
operations.text: Preserve the user’s local trust boundary.

operations.name: s1.c2.bullets
operations.text:
• No WorkIQ API; local CLI only
• Depends on local identity, config, VPN, and device context
• No inbound exposure on personal devices
• AAD tokens, cookies, and corporate access remain local

operations.name: s1.c2.quote
operations.text: Cloud intelligence needed a trusted local execution runtime.

operations.name: s1.c3.lead
operations.text: The device connects outbound; Gateway routes cloud intent to the local Worker.

operations.name: s1.diagram.caption
operations.text: Worker invokes workiq locally; identity and network context remain on device

operations.name: s1.diagram.chain
operations.text: Cloud Agent → Gateway → Local Worker → Local CLI

operations.name: s1.decision
operations.text: Outbound-only connectivity; no exposed personal-device ports.

operations.name: s1.footer
operations.text: First principle: Cloud Agents need a governed execution bridge into local tool environments.

operations.name: eyebrow
operations.text: 02 · PRODUCT INSIGHT: LOCAL TOOLS ARE THE REAL RUNTIME

operations.name: s2.left.big
operations.text: “Let my Agent use my existing tools.”

operations.name: s2.left.p
operations.text: The highest-value work context already lives on user-owned devices.

operations.name: s2.gateway.txt
operations.text:
MCPHub Gateway
AAD · Permission · Device Routing
Capability Registry · Activity History

operations.name: s2.toolbox.txt
operations.text:
Personal Device Toolchain
Trusted AAD-bound devices connect outbound

operations.name: s2.right.title
operations.text: From Point Integration to Reusable Runtime

operations.name: s2.right.big
operations.text: One integration revealed a repeatable platform pattern.

operations.name: s2.right.p
operations.text: Agents need access to the user’s existing local tool ecosystem.

operations.name: s2.right.bullets
operations.text:
• Generalizable: CLI · Portal · Files · Browser · Repo
• Identity-bound: AAD · Device · Permission
• Differentiated: the execution runtime layer
• Safe by design: credentials stay local

operations.name: s2.footer
operations.text: Positioning: Turn personal devices into governed local execution runtimes for cloud Agents.

operations.name: eyebrow
operations.text: 03 · TRUSTED EXECUTION: HOW AGENTS CALL LOCAL CAPABILITIES

operations.name: s3.left.title
operations.text: A. Discover Entry Point + Publish Capabilities

operations.name: s3.left.lead
operations.text: Agent discovers the Gateway. Worker publishes a governed local capability catalog.

operations.name: s3.top.note
operations.text: Agent discovers entry point; Worker publishes catalog

operations.name: s3.right.lead
operations.text: HTTP request enters Gateway. Gateway routes and signs. Worker executes locally.

operations.name: s3r.validate.txt
operations.text:
validate + bind + approve
signature · nonce · tool binding

operations.name: s3r.bullets
operations.text:
Entry: Skill/config provides Gateway + /tool_call
Routing: select Worker by connectionId, clientName, or labels
Execution: validate request, then toolRegistry.callTool

operations.name: s3.footer
operations.text: Protocol: Agent → HTTP(S) Gateway; Worker → WS(S); Gateway converts HTTP /tool_call into WS tool_call. Harness: Gateway governs, Worker executes, Activity proves.
